description_long: A young adult male stands confidently, dressed in a modern, urban outfit featuring a short-sleeve striped shirt with bold green and gray accents. He wears matching jogger-style pants adorned with graphic wing motifs and geometric patterns, complemented by white sneakers. His forearms are exposed, revealing a detailed tattoo sleeve on his left arm, and he sports fingerless gloves on both hands. A black face mask covers his lower face, and a gold chain necklace adds a touch of street style. His hair is styled in a high, sharp fade, and his stance is wide and assertive, suggesting alertness and readiness. The overall appearance is that of a fashionable city dweller, blending athletic and streetwear influences.
description: A stylish young man in urban streetwear with a striped shirt, graphic joggers, face mask, and tattooed arm, standing confidently.
description_view_0: Front view shows the striped shirt, face mask, gold chain, tattooed left arm, and both hands with fingerless gloves.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the tattoo sleeve, glove, and the graphic wing motif on the left pant leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt with a graphic design, both arms, and the full pattern on the pants.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the geometric pattern on the right pant leg and the clean lines of the shirt and gloves.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeve striped shirt, jogger pants with graphic motifs, fingerless gloves, face mask, gold chain necklace
